description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and defines the variables GRADLE_VERSION='2.13' and GRAILS_VERSION=3.1.9. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y unzip, installs SDKMAN, configures it for automatic answers, installs and selects Gradle $GRADLE_VERSION, writes gradle.properties with grailsVersion=$GRAILS_VERSION and gradleWrapperVersion=2.14, refreshes Gradle dependencies, and creates a .bowerrc allowing root. Define a single job named build in the default test stage that executes the shell command ./gradlew build. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are specified.
